description:
Metadata persisted when an asset is suspended from automatic sync.

Each suspended asset gets a JSON file at `{suspended_dir}/{asset_name}.json`. The serve loop reads these flags to skip sync for suspended assets; `nagi serve resume` deletes them to re-enable sync.

asset_name.description: Name of the suspended Asset resource.

execution_id.description: The sync execution_id that triggered the suspension, if available.

suspended_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the asset was suspended.

title: SuspendedInfo
